name: academorix/health
purpose: Attribute-driven health check discovery + notification routing — bridges spatie/laravel-health with #[AsHealthCheck] auto-registration and a HealthNotificationChannel enum.
capabilities: Cron schedule + condition gate per check
when_to_use: Registering a periodic Spatie Health check that reports to a logical channel (Slack, PagerDuty, Email).
when_not_to_use: For low-level uptime pings without a check-class contract, curl Spatie Health's /health endpoint directly.
